violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment must have individuals trained as food safety managers. Once individual is trained, they must register FSM with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine and can opener have an accumulation of debris. Non-Food contact surfaces must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2026

The dumpster outside is located on broken asphalt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2027

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Various food items were observed cooling in the walk-in cooler with lids on containers before the food products obtained an internal temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Lids were removed from containers to allow proper cooling. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2024

Wood is used in the construction of the walk-in cooler door jamb. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Establishment is cover wood with nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler fan guards have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet room doors that open to food preparation areas shall be self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener,) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

Wood is used in the construction of the flat top grill. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. 11/31/23 Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the walk in cooler, the freezer and the low boy. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023
